title: Bring back the Zombie Pigman
description: This Texture Pack replaces the Zombified Piglin with the Zombie Pigman
body:
This Texture Pack replaces the Zombified Piglin with the Zombie Pigman.
Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

if you use the vanilla textures you should use the jappa version but if you use the programmer art textures you should use the notch version

Credits:
 -[Textures and icon](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Zombified_Piglin) -[Golden days texture pack (is what gave me the idea to make this but it didnt have the baby zombie pigman model it only had the adult so i made this)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days/versions)
